description: You are a proteomics biochemist planning a two-dimensional gel electrophoresis (2D-PAGE) experiment on mitochondrial extracts. Profile the theoretical Isoelectric Points (pI) and Molecular Weights (MW) of the 8 Cytochrome c orthologous sequences found in `~/UGENE_Data/cytochrome_c_multispecies.fasta`. Generate a CSV file at `~/UGENE_Data/results/cytc_2d_gel_profile.csv` containing the Accession, Length, MW, and pI for each sequence. Based on these results, create a recommendation file at `~/UGENE_Data/results/ief_strip_recommendation.txt` that identifies the accessions with the highest (most basic) and lowest (most acidic) pI values and suggests an appropriate pH range for the IEF strip.

metadata.data_source: UniProt Cytochrome c orthologs (P99999, P67881, P00048, P00053, P00044, P04657, P00004, P62895)
